highlights.summary: Release notes for Trio v0.8.2: OmnipodKit is made the sole Omnipod driver (OmniBLE and OmniKit submodules removed) and the Add Pump/Onboarding flow now lists a single “All Omnipod Types” entry; Live Activity receives several UI fixes and enhancements (active temp targets now render as a green band on the Live Activity chart with a named badge; indefinite overrides no longer collapse the chart rule to the current moment; COB string and Live Activity widget item labels were corrected/localized); a watch connectivity/back-sync fix reduces stale-data hangups on the watch; and Stats > Meals now shows today's carbs, fat, and and protein correctly. Additionally, CI/dev config bumps APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig.
highlights.userFacingImpact:
Conservative summary of user impact: 
- Users of Omnipod pumps will see only the OmnipodKit driver and a single “All Omnipod Types” option when adding a pump or during onboarding (driver submodules removed).
- Live Activity widgets and the Live Activity chart will display active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, should handle indefinite overrides correctly, and have corrected/localized widget labels.
- Apple Watch users should experience faster recovery from stale data / improved back-sync behavior.
- The Meals/Stats view should now show today’s macros (carbs, fat, protein) correctly.
If you need verification of any behavioral changes in-device, please perform manual testing; the supplied sources document the changes but do not include runtime test results.

items.summary: Release notes for Trio v0.8.2: OmnipodKit is made the sole Omnipod driver (OmniBLE and OmniKit submodules removed) and the Add Pump/Onboarding flow now lists a single “All Omnipod Types” entry; Live Activity receives several UI fixes and enhancements (active temp targets now render as a green band on the Live Activity chart with a named badge; indefinite overrides no longer collapse the chart rule to the current moment; COB string and Live Activity widget item labels were corrected/localized); a watch connectivity/back-sync fix reduces stale-data hangups on the watch; and Stats > Meals now shows today's carbs, fat, and and protein correctly. Additionally, CI/dev config bumps APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig.

Conservative summary of user impact: 
- Users of Omnipod pumps will see only the OmnipodKit driver and a single “All Omnipod Types” option when adding a pump or during onboarding (driver submodules removed).
- Live Activity widgets and the Live Activity chart will display active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, should handle indefinite overrides correctly, and have corrected/localized widget labels.
- Apple Watch users should experience faster recovery from stale data / improved back-sync behavior.
- The Meals/Stats view should now show today’s macros (carbs, fat, protein) correctly.
If you need verification of any behavioral changes in-device, please perform manual testing; the supplied sources document the changes but do not include runtime test results.

items.summary: Fixes an off-by-seconds filter in Stat.StateModel that caused today's per-day meal bucket to be excluded from date-range averages. calculateAveragesForDateRange previously filtered cached per-day entries by testing the bucket's start instant against startDate; the change tests bucket-window overlap (dayStart < endDate && dayEnd > startDate) so a day is included if any moment of it overlaps the requested range (addresses #1181). Separately, the code that built the per-day cache was simplified: the prior grouping + average logic was replaced with a Dictionary keyed by startOfDay using uniquingKeysWith to sum per-day totals, and the cached property/terminology was renamed from dailyAveragesCache to dailyMealTotalsCache (function renamed to calculateAndCacheDailyTotals). (Sources: pr:gordolio/Trio#1188, pr:nightscout/Trio#1188, commit:5ac5cebefcc4ded3b663c2f35ff750b6f88f7c26, commit:75da5e9682737334e0e315f22147ad068ff31b6f, commit:a7827806c79fdbf8690463158b5095b4962f1319, commit:0efb442e2f7c7bb1de7ecfcda8937ed456b8cf62, file:680291be0cce, file:9d61f928d9ac, diff:b2879763e027)
items.userFacingImpact: Fixes the issue where the Meals stats chart could show zero carbs/fat/protein for the current day because the start-of-day bucket was excluded when the view's startDate was a few seconds past midnight. After this change, the current day's macros should be included in date-range calculations (Sources: pr:gordolio/Trio#1188, commit:5ac5cebefcc4ded3b663c2f35ff750b6f88f7c26, diff:b2879763e027).

sources.title: gordolio/Trio#1188: Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day
nightscout/Trio#1188: Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day
Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day (#1181)
Address PR feedback: rename function, remove context

items.summary: When an override duration was 0 (treated as indefinite) the code previously computed end == start, giving the RuleMark zero width and preventing it from rendering. The change makes duration == 0 set the end to Date(timeIntervalSinceNow: 7200) (now + 2 hours); otherwise it uses start.addingTimeInterval(durationAsTimeInterval).
items.userFacingImpact: Indefinite overrides that previously did not appear in the Live Activity chart because the rendered bar had zero width should now be visible: the bar is extended to now + 2 hours to match the chart's x-axis domain. Evidence is from the PR description, commit message, and the code diff.

Fix indefinite override not drawn in Live Activity chart

includedPullRequests.title: Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day
includedPullRequests.body:
## Summary 
* `calculateAveragesForDateRange` filtered cached daily totals with a strict `date >= startDate` against day-keys that are startOfDay. The .day-interval
* initial scroll position is startOfDay(today) + 1s, which leaves today's `today 00:00:00` bucket just outside the range, zeroing today's carbs/fat/protein in the Meals chart (reported as #1181).
* Scrolling slightly back into yesterday made today appear again.

## Fix
* Compare against the day window (overlap semantics) instead of the day's start instant: a cached day belongs in the range if any moment of it overlaps.
* Backward-compatible for `.week`/`.month`/`.total` because those intervals already align `startDate` to midnight.

## Additional Change
* Simplify calculateAndCacheDailyAverages (no behavior change) 
* `dailyMealStats` is already one entry per day from `fetchMealStats`, so the previous `Dictionary(grouping:)` and per-group reduce + divide-by-count was a passthrough (count==1, total/1==total).
* Replace with a direct `Dictionary(_, uniquingKeysWith:)` re-key by `startOfDay`, keeping the defensive sum-merge in case a future caller constructs MealStats with mid-day timestamps.

---

Addresses #1181.

includedPullRequests.title: Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day
includedPullRequests.body:
## Summary 
* `calculateAveragesForDateRange` filtered cached daily totals with a strict `date >= startDate` against day-keys that are startOfDay. The .day-interval
* initial scroll position is startOfDay(today) + 1s, which leaves today's `today 00:00:00` bucket just outside the range, zeroing today's carbs/fat/protein in the Meals chart (reported as #1181).
* Scrolling slightly back into yesterday made today appear again.

## Fix
* Compare against the day window (overlap semantics) instead of the day's start instant: a cached day belongs in the range if any moment of it overlaps.
* Backward-compatible for `.week`/`.month`/`.total` because those intervals already align `startDate` to midnight.

## Additional Change
* Simplify calculateAndCacheDailyAverages (no behavior change) 
* `dailyMealStats` is already one entry per day from `fetchMealStats`, so the previous `Dictionary(grouping:)` and per-group reduce + divide-by-count was a passthrough (count==1, total/1==total).
* Replace with a direct `Dictionary(_, uniquingKeysWith:)` re-key by `startOfDay`, keeping the defensive sum-merge in case a future caller constructs MealStats with mid-day timestamps.

---

Addresses #1181.

includedPullRequests.title: Fix indefinite override not drawn in Live Activity chart
includedPullRequests.body:
When override duration is 0 (indefinite), end date equaled start date, giving the RuleMark zero width and preventing it from rendering. Treat duration == 0 as indefinite and extend the bar to now + 2 hours, matching the chart's x-axis domain.

Fixes #1191

Fixes #1191

includedPullRequests.title: Trio v0.8.2 patch release
includedPullRequests.body:
## What's Changed At A Glance

- **OmnipodKit is now the sole Omnipod driver** — OmniBLE and OmniKit submodules removed; "All Omnipod Types" is the only Omnipod entry in Add Pump and Onboarding
- **Live Activity Enhancements / Fixes:**
   -  Temp target on chart — active temp targets now render as a green band on the Live Activity chart, with a named badge alongside the override badge
   - Ondefinite override fix — overrides with no set duration no longer collapse the chart's rule mark to the current moment
   - COB label and widget string fixes — corrected the COB string and localized all widget item labels
- **Watch connectivity fix** — massively improve watch performance; stale data on watch now updates in just a moment vs. getting stuck during processing.
- **Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day** — today's carbs, fat, and protein now always appear correctly in the Meals chart
---

## Full List of PRs in `0.8.2`

| PR | Title | Author |
|---|---|---|
| [#1180](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1180) | Add temp target display to Live Activity lock screen widget | [@t1dude](https://github.com/t1dude) |
| [#1182](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1182) | Update CODEOWNERS: add @marionbarker and @kingst | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1184](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1184) | Fix COB string, localize Live Activity widget item labels | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1188](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1188) | Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1190](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1190) | Fix watch app back-sync after long staleness | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1192](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1192) | Fix indefinite override not drawn in Live Activity chart | [@t1dude](https://github.com/t1dude) |
| [#1200](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1200) | Remove Legacy Omnipod Submodules (OmniKit, OmniBLE) | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |

---

## Contributors

@dnzxy @t1dude @marv-out
